sha_convention: sha256 over on-disk raw bytes (binary read, no line-ending normalization) — the convention the task-list hash is pinned against
default_path_unchanged: no --task-list = legacy full-pool behavior (every MBPP train problem, stratum repetition only)
pool_pin: prereg §5 (mail 14514): theta (0,0.5] live-frontier strictly; dead-task GRPO = named round-3 candidate
quarantine_note: adapter r2-q3-grpo stays PRE-GATE/QUARANTINED until rerun on the load-bearing selection — dispatch is the gate-holder's call
